purpose: FLAGSHIP END-TO-END: Qwen3-235B-A22B-class decode on a <=20 GB VRAM working set, experts streamed from host pinned RAM, MoE compute via the fused NF4 kernel (bench/phase3/offload_decode_235b.py). Phase A: synthetic weights (decode timing is data-independent; numerics pinned separately by the 44-test suite), REAL bf16 GQA attention + KV, random top-k router (conservative gather locality). The registered question: does the pipelined system achieve the waterfall (link-bound) prediction, with the kernel's compute hidden under the copy stream?
frozen_commit: ca6545b (grouped-nf4-gemm main; harness/kernel unchanged since the v5 freeze 47a06ba except this phase3 script). No changes between this stamp and reported results.

protocol.host: First available of: Latitude g3-h100-small bare metal (out of stock at registration — notifier armed) OR a RunPod SECURE pod with >=150 GB container RAM (H100 SXM class). Host class recorded in receipts; the claim is host-agnostic by construction (waterfall predicts from the MEASURED link).
protocol.config: Qwen3-235B-A22B geometry: layers=min(94, floor((free_host_RAM_GB - 12) / 1.365)) — the runner sizes the streamed store to the box and records L; per-token bytes scale linearly in L by the registered formula (L * k * (N_gu*K_gu/2 + N_gu*K_gu/16 + N_dn*K_dn/2 + N_dn*K_dn/16)); E=128, k=8, hidden=4096, inter=1536, GQA 64/4 x128.
protocol.runs: one process per mode: none (pure-stream ceiling), dequant (LUT-decode + bf16 matmul MoE), fused (the kernel); fused run twice (n=2 fresh-process). 64 measured tokens + 4 warmup per run; link microbench (10x 1 GiB pinned H2D) recorded per process.
protocol.reduction: median s/token per run; tok/s = 1/median; waterfall ceiling = link_GBps * 1e9 / per_token_bytes.

frozen_verdict_criteria.FL1_waterfall: fused tok/s >= 0.85 x waterfall ceiling (both fused reps).
frozen_verdict_criteria.FL2_vram: torch peak allocated <= 20.0 GB in every run.
frozen_verdict_criteria.FL3_hidden_compute: fused tok/s >= 0.97 x none-mode tok/s (the kernel's MoE compute hides under the copy stream) AND fused tok/s >= dequant tok/s (paired, same box).
frozen_verdict_criteria.REPORT: absolute tok/s at as-run L; 94-layer-equivalent tok/s = tok/s * L / 94 (linear-in-L, registered here, labeled extrapolation when L < 94); host class + link GB/s; J/token if NVML readable.
frozen_verdict_criteria.no_tune_clause: Failures reported at full volume; claims narrowed; no re-runs until green.
